mapper.select: SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_id, ur.reg_id, ur.reg_dt, ur.chg_id, ur.chg_dt, ur.del_id, ur.del_dt, ur.del_yn FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id WHERE ur.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_id, ur.reg_id, ur.reg_dt, ur.chg_id, ur.chg_dt, ur.del_id, ur.del_dt, ur.del_yn FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT user_id, role_id, ur.reg_id, ur.reg_dt, ur.chg_id, ur.chg_dt, ur.del_id, ur.del_dt, ur.del_yn FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_role ( user_id, role_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{regId}, COALESCE(#{regDt}, NOW()), #{chgId}, COALESCE(#{chgDt}, NOW()), #{delYn} )

INSERT INTO user_role ( member_id, role_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES
( #{userRole.memberId}, #{userRole.roleId}, #{userRole.regId}, COALESCE(#{userRole.regDt}, NOW()), #{userRole.chgId}, COALESCE(#{userRole.chgDt}, NOW()), #{userRole.delYn} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM user_role WHERE (user_id, role_id) IN
#{userRole.userId}, #{userRole.roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id WHERE ur.member_id = #{memberId} AND ur.role_id = #{roleId} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_role SET del_yn = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN #{userRole.delYn}
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN del_yn
ELSE del_yn END, chg_id = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN #{userRole.chgId}
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN chg_id
ELSE chg_id END, chg_dt = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN COALESCE(#{userRole.chgDt}, NOW())
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN NOW()
ELSE chg_dt END, del_id = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN #{userRole.delId}
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN del_id
ELSE del_id END, del_dt = CASE
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN COALESCE(#{userRole.delDt}, NOW())
WHEN (user_id = #{userRole.userId} AND role_id = #{userRole.roleId}) THEN NOW()
ELSE del_dt END WHERE (user_id, role_id) IN
(#{userRole.userId}, #{userRole.roleId})
mapper.select:
SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_id, ur.reg_id, ur.reg_dt, ur.chg_id, ur.chg_dt, ur.del_id, ur.del_dt, ur.del_yn FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id INNER JOIN user u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id WHERE (ur.user_id, ur.role_id) IN
(#{userRole.userId}, #{userRole.roleId})
